description:
Toggles stress damage in [[Description.ext#forceRotorLibSimulation | Advanced Flight Model]], which otherwise could be manually toggles in game setting: {{hl|Options > Game > Helicopter Flight Model > Advanced > Stress Damage}}.
{{Feature|afm}}
name: enableStressDamage

Item.desc: [[true]] to enable stress damage, [[false]] to disable it
Item.name: state
